input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.1.4
            TITLE: the organizer, chief technical inspector, or a designee may void inspection approval at any

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.1.4: The Organizer, Chief Technical Inspector, or a designee may void Inspection Approval at any
IN.13.1.4 The Organizer, Chief Technical Inspector, or a designee may void Inspection Approval at any 
time for any reason

final_answer: The Organizer, Chief Technical Inspector, or a designee may void Inspection Approval at any time for any reason
